title: fragaria viridis subvar. subpinnata
intro: Fragaria viridis subvar. subpinnata, also known as green strawberry or wild strawberry, is a subspecies of the Fragaria viridis plant, a type of strawberry native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Fragaria viridis subvar. subpinnata include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Fragaria viridis subvar. subpinnata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat fever and respiratory issues.
